title: OCI Dynamic Group Created with Broad Matching
description: Detects creation of dynamic groups with instance principal matching that may grant excessive permissions.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and (('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.createdynamicgroup') and (('Original Log Content' like '*Any {*' or 'Original Log Content' like '*compartment.id*' or 'Original Log Content' like '*instance.compartment.id*')))
falsepositives: Legitimate dynamic group creation for instance principals
